title: Stormite
description: Adds Stormite weapons, tools, and a powerful Stormite Totem with custom effects.
body:
[![](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/stormite?logo=modrinth&color=242629&labelColor=00AF5C&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/stormite) [![](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/stormite?logo=modrinth&label=&style=flat&color=242629&labelColor=00AF5C&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/stormite) [![CF](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/1333184_all.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stormite) [![CF](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_1333184.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stormite) # Stormite ### Description The Stormite Mod adds powerful new items and tools with unique abilities: --- **Stormite Sword** * **10 Attack Damage** * **2048 Durability** * Strikes lightning on hit. * Chance to chain lightning to a second mob. **Stormite Axe** * **12 Attack Damage** * **2048 Durability** * Disables shields for **10 seconds** (diamond = 5s). **Stormite Pickaxe** * **2048 Durability** * Faster than diamond. **Stormite Shovel** * **2048 Durability** * Same speed as diamond. **Stormite Totem** * Works like a Totem of Undying. * Teleports you randomly within 50 blocks. * Grants **Absorption III** and **Regeneration III**. **Stormite Shard** * A crafting material for Stormite items. * Crafted using **1 Amethyst Shard + 1 Gold Ingot + 1 Quartz**. --- ### Crafting Recipes
Stormite Shard Recipe ![shard crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d2fd16b2ab1ce8e0daeef2047babaa96ae556a3.png)
Stormite Sword Recipe ![sword crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc3b7f5349716689c0aaeee70a6e3bb043a73606.png)
Stormite Axe Recipe ![stormite axe recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/580d9d9bb2d0f5f638b3eac5b92408a92ebbcafc.png)
Stormite Pickaxe Recipe ![stormite pickaxe recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15381f46e0a0930d5e321e812d8c7064bcdf8490.png)
Stormite Shovel Recipe ![stormite shovel crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35f9d434220731e81cae9d89d16d43f03e4e33a8.png)
Stormite Totem Recipe ![stormite totem crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0c5b38929ce970fc33cda71b0933d2e58985342.png)
--- ### Features * Long-lasting tools (2048 durability each). * Late-game tools and weapons designed for strong abilities **without an armor set**. * Unique mechanics: lightning, shield disable, teleport + buffs.
